Company Overview

London-based ITAD and workplace technology partner. Certified data erasure to ADISA L2 and Common Criteria EAL3+ standards. End-to-end IT lifecycle management — from secure asset recovery and forensic wiping to complete office technology deployment. We protect your data, maximise your returns, and build the infrastructure your teams need to perform.

Core Services

Data Destruction

Certified erasure with audit trails and certificates.

IT Buyback

Fair-market valuation with free UK-wide collection.

IT Solutions

End-to-end workplace technology deployment.

International Operations

Global Reach: Export & Logistics

UK-based ITAD provider exporting bulk refurbished enterprise equipment to world markets. International compliance documentation for cross-border equipment transfers and asset recovery programs.

Export Capabilities →

London-based ITAD provider delivering compliant asset disposal, secure data destruction, and international remarketing.
